title: AirBnB Clone
description:
The project includes developing both the front-end and back-end components.
Key features include user authentication, property listings, booking functionality, and user reviews.
The project emphasizes using technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Python, Flask, and SQLAlchemy.

title: Simple Shell
description:
The project involves developing a simple UNIX command interpreter.
The shell is capable of executing commands in the PATH, handling arguments, and executing built-in commands.
The project emphasizes using technologies such as C, system calls, and the UNIX environment.

title: Personal Website
description: My personal website serves as a central hub for showcasing my skills, projects, and professional journey. It features a clean and modern design, tailored to reflect my personal brand.

title: AI Chatbot
description:
The project involves developing an AI chatbot capable of answering user queries.
The chatbot is trained on a dataset of questions and answers using machine learning techniques.
The project emphasizes using technologies such as React, Nextjs, OpenAI API
